name: MP9 | 羽量级
descriptionEn: Manufactured in Switzerland, the cutting-edge MP9 SMG is an ergonomic polymer weapon favored by private security firms. It has been custom painted in black and white to appear porous, which saves weight for the weapon holder. A good marksman doesn't blame their tools
descriptionZh: 由瑞士制造，尖端的 MP9 微型冲锋枪是一把符合人类工效学的聚合物武器，深受私人保安公司青睐。 这把武器使用以减轻使用者负重的黑白多孔结构进行了自定义涂装。 好射手不会怪武器不顺手
